Austria.name: Rat auf Draht (Parental Support)
Austria.info: 24/7 support for children and their caregivers.

Belgium.name: Ecoute-Enfants (Wallonia) / Tele-Onthaal (Flanders)
Belgium.info: General support lines that assist parents with family issues.

Bulgaria.name: National Telephone Line for Children (includes parents)
Bulgaria.info: Operated by the State Agency for Child Protection.

Croatia.name: Hrabri Telefon (Brave Phone for Parents)
Croatia.info: Specific line dedicated to parents and caregivers.

Cyprus.name: Cyprus Childline (Parental Guidance)
Cyprus.info: European harmonized number providing support for families.

Czech Republic.name: Linka bezpečí (Safety Line - Rodičovská linka)
Czech Republic.info: Dedicated parental helpline for educational and family crisis.

Denmark.name: ForældreTelefonen (Børns Vilkår)
Denmark.info: Specialized helpline for parents and educators.

Estonia.name: Lasteabi (Child Helpline for all)
Estonia.info: 24/7 service for child-related concerns, including parents.

Finland.name: MLL Parent Telephone (Mannerheim League)
Finland.info: Professional guidance for parents on upbringing and family life.

France.name: Allô Enfance en Danger
France.info: National service for children at risk, also serving parents.

Germany.name: Elterntelefon (Nummer gegen Kummer)
Germany.info: Anonymous and free counseling for parents.

Greece.name: Together for Children / The Smile of the Child
Greece.info: Counseling and psychological support for families.

Hungary.name: Kék Vonal (Blue Line for Parents)
Hungary.info: Provides a dedicated line for adults worried about children.

Ireland.name: Parentline Ireland
Ireland.info: Volunteer-led helpline providing support and guidance to parents.

Italy.name: Telefono Azzurro (Line for Adults)
Italy.info: Dedicated counseling for children and adults regarding child welfare.

Latvia.name: Uzticības tālrunis (Trust Phone)
Latvia.info: State-run helpline for children, adolescents, and parents.

Luxembourg.name: Elterntelefon (Kanner-Jugendtelefon)
Luxembourg.info: Direct line for parents and caregivers.

Malta.name: Supportline 179
Malta.info: 24/7 national helpline for all social welfare concerns.

Poland.name: 800 100 100 (Helpline for Parents/Teachers)
Poland.info: Focused on safety and mental health of children.

Portugal.name: SOS Criança (IAC)
Portugal.info: 800 number is specialized for family and adoption support.

Romania.name: Telefonul Copilului (Parental Support)
Romania.info: Counseling for children and their legal representatives.

Slovakia.name: Linka detskej istoty (Child Safety Line)
Slovakia.info: Provides support for families in crisis.

Slovenia.name: TOM Telefon (National Helpline)
Slovenia.info: General helpline often used by parents for advice.

Spain.name: Teléfono ANAR para la Familia
Spain.info: Dedicated line for adults and family members.

Sweden.name: BRIS Adult Helpline
Sweden.info: Specialized support for adults regarding children's rights.

Switzerland.name: Elternnotruf (Parental Emergency)
Switzerland.info: 24/7 specialist advice for parents and caregivers.
